name: proposal
description: Proposal lifecycle management: registration, structure validation, history tracking, templates.

requirements.title: Register proposal
requirements.description: Copy or link a proposal file to spec/proposals/, validate that required sections are present (Vision, Modules, Key requirements, Design decisions for project proposals; Context, Proposed change, Impact expectation for change proposals).

requirements.title: Show proposal history
requirements.description: List all proposals with their dates, show which proposals led to which spec changes and which bead actions (via spec_proposal metadata on beads).

requirements.title: Provide templates
requirements.description: Output a project proposal template or a change proposal template to stdout. Templates include all required sections with placeholder content.

requirements.title: Git-native proposals
requirements.description: Proposals are plain markdown files in spec/proposals/. No database, no external state. Everything is committed to git.

components.name: Registrar
components.description: Copies or links a proposal file to spec/proposals/ and validates that required sections are present.

components.name: HistoryViewer
components.description: Queries proposals and their linked spec changes and bead actions to show the proposal history.

components.name: TemplateProvider
components.description: Generates and outputs proposal templates (project and change) to stdout.

data_flows.name: Proposal lifecycle
data_flows.description: Proposal file → register (validate + copy) → spec change → impact → bead actions → history query.
